basic_details.job_title: CDM&PHO Balangir – Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS – 3 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chief District Medical Office, Balangir (CDM&PHO Balangir) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE and MO MBBS. Candidates with MBBS Can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 09-06-2026. For detailed information please visit CDM&PHO Balangir official website.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from an institution recognized by Medical Council of India with valid registration from Odisha Council of Medical Registration. MD in Medicine/Post Graduate Diploma in Geriatric Medicine preferred for Physician/Consultant Medicine. MBBS or equivalent degree for MO MBBS.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 86,116/- pm + Others allowances for Physician/Consultant Medicine, NPHCE; Rs. 57,409/- pm + Others allowances for MO MBBS

seo_tags: CDM&PHO Balangir Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Physician/Consultant Medicine, and MO MBBS Posts
